icd_code_descriptions: Malignant neoplasms of lymphoid, hematopoietic and related tissue; Malignant neoplasm of lymphoid, hematopoietic and related tissue, unspecified; Other ill-defined sites
original_path_lab_diagnosis: Mixed infiltration of histiocytes and lymphoplasmacytes, findings are suggestive of Rosai-Dorfman disease
